holdings.infoBox: DVAL is an equity ETF with a total of 114 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 4.60%, GE Aerospace at 4.48%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.42%, Bank of America at 4.09%, and Wells Fargo & Company at 3.96%.

overview.description: The BrandywineGLOBAL - Dynamic US Large Cap Value ETF (DVAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Value index. The fund is actively managed to hold a portfolio of US large-cap value companies. Stocks are selected using a proprietary multi-factor approach. DVAL was launched on Dec 27, 2006 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
